enabledPlatforms.title: Trigger platforms
enabledPlatforms.description: One per line: twitch, youtube, kick, or tiktok.

triggerOnFirstChat.title: Shout out approved users on their first chat
triggerOnFirstChat.description: Only users listed in the first-chat allowlist qualify. Empty means nobody, never everybody.

firstChatResetHours.title: First-chat inactivity reset (hours)
firstChatResetHours.description: Fallback for TikTok-only sessions, where TikFinity does not provide the bridge a reliable stream-online lifecycle event. A live stream.online event still resets immediately.

firstChatAllowlist.title: First-chat allowlist
firstChatAllowlist.description: One per line: username, platform:username, or platform:id:stable-user-id.

manualCommandName.title: Manual command name
manualCommandName.description: Create this command in Command Sync (recommended aliases: so, shoutout) and require Moderator or Broadcaster.

ignoredUsers.title: Never shout out these users
ignoredUsers.description: Same matching format as the allowlist. This list wins over every automatic or manual trigger.

selectedPlatforms.title: Selected destination platforms
selectedPlatforms.description: Used only when delivery mode is selected. One platform per line.

raidTemplate.title: Twitch raid message
raidTemplate.description: Sent only after Twitch returns a non-empty category. Tokens: {displayName}, {user}, {category}, {channelUrl}, {viewers}, {trigger}.
raidTemplate.default: Thank you {displayName} for the raid with {viewers} viewers! They stream {category}. Watch them at {channelUrl}

twitchFirstChatTemplate.title: Twitch creator first-chat message
twitchFirstChatTemplate.description: Only allowlisted users with a confirmed Twitch category qualify.

twitchViewerWelcomeTemplate.title: Twitch viewer first-chat welcome
twitchViewerWelcomeTemplate.description: Used once per stream for an allowlisted Twitch first-time chatter when the verified lookup returns no current category. This is a welcome, not a streamer promotion.
twitchViewerWelcomeTemplate.default: Welcome to the stream, {displayName}! Thanks for joining us on Twitch.

youtubeWelcomeTemplate.title: YouTube first-chat welcome
youtubeWelcomeTemplate.description: A welcome only; Streamer.bot cannot verify an arbitrary YouTube chatter's current category.
youtubeWelcomeTemplate.default: Welcome to the stream, {displayName}! Thanks for joining us on YouTube.

kickWelcomeTemplate.title: Kick first-chat welcome
kickWelcomeTemplate.description: A welcome only; Streamer.bot exposes the connected Kick broadcaster, not an arbitrary chatter's category.
kickWelcomeTemplate.default: Welcome to the stream, {displayName}! Thanks for joining us on Kick.

tiktokWelcomeTemplate.title: TikTok first-chat welcome
tiktokWelcomeTemplate.description: A welcome only; TikFinity does not provide a current channel category for the chatter.
tiktokWelcomeTemplate.default: Welcome, {displayName}! Thanks for joining the TikTok live.

manualTwitchTemplate.title: Manual Twitch shoutout message
manualTwitchTemplate.description: The target is still category-verified before this message is sent.

manualChannelTemplate.title: Manual YouTube, Kick, and TikTok shoutout
manualChannelTemplate.description: Moderator-selected channel link; no category claim is made.
manualChannelTemplate.default: Go check out {displayName} at {channelUrl} and show them some love!

onePerStream.title: Shout out each user only once per stream

twitchShoutoutMode.title: Twitch shoutout mode
twitchShoutoutMode.description: Native uses Streamer.bot's Twitch API action and its platform cooldowns. Both sends native plus editable text.

showOverlayCard.title: Show a shoutout card in the hosted add-on overlay
